title: WhatsApp/Instagram-style messaging + social feed MVP

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication and a minimal onboarding flow: first sign-in creates a user record; prompt for display name, unique username/handle, and optional bio + avatar.

quotes: create a app like whatsapp&instagram(chating app).

acceptanceCriteria: User can sign in with Internet Identity.
On first sign-in, a user record is created in the canister keyed by Principal.
User can set display name and a unique username/handle; uniqueness is enforced by the backend.
User can view and edit their profile (display name, handle, bio, avatar image URL/path).

requirements.text: Create core data models and canister methods for a simple Instagram-like social layer: user search, follow/unfollow, and a posts feed where users can create posts with a caption and up to 10 images (stored as frontend static asset URLs) and view a timeline feed from followed users.

quotes: create a app like whatsapp&instagram(chating app).

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes methods to: search users by handle/display name, follow/unfollow, list followers/following, create post, list my posts, list feed posts (from followed + self).
A post includes: author, timestamp, caption text, and array of image URLs (0–10).
Frontend screens exist for: Explore/Search users, a basic Profile page, Create Post, and Feed.
Feed shows posts in reverse chronological order and includes author + caption + images.

requirements.text: Create a WhatsApp-like 1:1 direct messaging system: start a conversation with another user, list conversations, send messages, and view message history with polling-based refresh (no real-time sockets).

quotes: create a app like whatsapp&instagram(chating app).

acceptanceCriteria: Backend supports: create/get 1:1 conversation by participant pair, list my conversations, send message, list messages (paged by timestamp/id).
Message includes: sender, timestamp, text content, and optional image URL (single).
Frontend includes: Conversations list, Chat thread view, composer to send text and optional image URL, and a user picker to start a new chat from search results.
Chat thread refreshes via periodic polling using React Query (e.g., refetchInterval) and does not rely on WebSockets.
Only conversation participants can read/send messages in that conversation (enforced by backend).

requirements.text: Add navigation and app structure for the MVP with these primary sections: Feed, Explore, Messages, Profile, and Create Post; ensure consistent layout across desktop and mobile widths.

quotes: create a app like whatsapp&instagram(chating app).

acceptanceCriteria: App has a clear primary navigation (bottom tab on mobile and/or sidebar/top nav on desktop).
Routes/pages exist for Feed, Explore, Messages, Profile, Create Post, and Chat thread detail.
Navigation state is preserved during normal use (back/forward works).

requirements.text: Choose and apply a coherent visual theme for the entire UI (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) suitable for a modern chat + social app; enforce it consistently across all screens.
acceptanceCriteria: A single distinct theme is applied consistently (no default mismatched styling).
All primary UI elements (navigation, headers, cards, buttons, inputs, message bubbles) follow the theme.
Theme avoids blue/purple as the primary palette unless explicitly requested later.

requirements.text: Add basic safety/quality features: input validation and empty/loading/error states across Feed, Explore, Messages, and Profile.
acceptanceCriteria: All networked views show loading states and readable error states.
Empty states exist for: no posts in feed, no conversations, no messages, and no search results.
Inputs validate: username required/unique, caption length limit, message length limit; user-facing validation text is in English.

requirements.text: Ensure stable canister storage for users, follows, posts, conversations, and messages using the Internet Computer canister state patterns appropriate for upgrades (stable storage) within a single Motoko actor.
acceptanceCriteria: All core entities (users, follows, posts, conversations, messages) persist across canister upgrades using stable variables and/or stable-friendly serialization patterns.
Access control is enforced using caller Principal for sensitive operations (profile edit, follow/unfollow, message send, create post).
All backend methods return clear error variants/messages for common failures (not signed in, user not found, not authorized, invalid input).

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (no additional backend services).
Frontend must be React + TypeScript with Tailwind and React Query.
Internet Identity is the only supported authentication method.
No WebSockets/real-time chat; use polling for message updates.

Do not modify files under frontend immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui (compose instead).
nonGoals: Group chats, channels, or broadcast lists.
Voice/video calls, audio messages, or live streaming.
Stories/Reels, post comments/likes, or advanced content moderation.
Push notifications, email/SMS messaging, or any external integrations.

required: App logo mark, modern minimal chat+camera hybrid glyph on transparent background (app-logo.dim_512x512.png)
Auth/onboarding illustration, abstract people chatting with warm tones (onboarding-illustration.dim_1200x800.png)
Empty state illustration for messages, minimal inbox/chat bubbles style (empty-messages.dim_900x600.png)
Empty state illustration for feed, minimal photo grid/camera style (empty-feed.dim_900x600.png)
